messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Design a global health vaccination partnership presentation targeting C-Suite executives (corporate partners). Name the file 'Global_Vaccination_Partnership.pptx', write in French, and set slides to 16:9 Widescreen landscape. The visual theme should be professional corporate grey and orange accent with modern layout structures. You are strictly prohibited from using external APIs or web scraping; embed all necessary data directly in your script. When generating charts, you must use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType. Furthermore, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None before setting its .text value.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# 16:9 widescreen — converted from 1280×720 px to inches (pptx uses EMUs internally)
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

DARK_GREY = "#2C3E50"
MEDIUM_GREY = "#7F8C8D"
LIGHT_GREY = "#ECF0F1"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
ORANGE_ACCENT = "#E67E22"
DEEP_ORANGE = "#D35400"

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = 0.6
MARGIN_RIGHT = 0.6
CARD_PADDING = 0.15


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, hex_color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(hex_color)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_GREY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_TITLE
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_hex=WHITE, border_hex=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_hex)
    if border_hex:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_hex)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, accent_color=ORANGE_ACCENT):
    bar_width = Inches(0.35)
    bar_height = Inches(0.06)
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.2), bar_width, bar_height)
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.85), Inches(1.15), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                             label_text, font_size=12, bold=True, color=MEDIUM_GREY)


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    footer_text = f"Partenariat Mondial de Vaccination — {page_number}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(3.5)), Inches(6.7), Inches(2.8), Inches(0.3),
                 footer_text, font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GREY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(1.8), Inches(9), Inches(1.5),
                 "Partenariat Mondial de Vaccination", font_size=40, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(3.6), Inches(7), Inches(1.2),
                 "Stratégie d'Investissement et Collaboration pour la Santé Globale\nPrésentation Exécutive aux Partenaires C-Suite",
                 font_size=18, color=MEDIUM_GREY)

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ORANGE_ACCENT)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.4), Inches(4), Inches(0.5),
                 "Confidentiel — Usage Interne Uniquement", font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GREY)


def slide_02_vision(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, "Vision Stratégique")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Notre Vision pour un Monde en Meilleure Santé"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.7), Inches(9), Inches(0.8),
                 "Le Partenariat Mondial de Vaccination vise à éliminer les disparités d'accès aux vaccins et à renforcer la résilience sanitaire mondiale.",
                 font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GREY)

    pillars = [
        ("Accès Universel", "Garantir l'accès équitable aux vaccins pour toutes les populations"),
        ("Innovation Collaborative", "Co-développer des solutions vaccinales de nouvelle génération"),
        ("Équité Sanitaire", "Réduire les inégalités entre pays riches et pays en développement")
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.5)
    card_height = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.15)
    start_x = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT)
    y_pos = Inches(3.0)

    for i, (title_text, desc_text) in enumerate(pillars):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, bg_hex=LIGHT_GREY)

        accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y_pos, Inches(0.06), card_height)
        accent_bar.fill.solid()
        accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ORANGE_ACCENT)
        accent_bar.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(CARD_PADDING), y_pos + Inches(CARD_PADDING),
                     card_width - Inches(CARD_PADDING * 2), Inches(0.5),
                     title_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(CARD_PADDING), y_pos + Inches(0.7),
                     card_width - Inches(CARD_PADDING * 2), Inches(1.0),
                     desc_text, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GREY)

    add_footer(slide, "2")


def slide_03_landscape(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, "Paysage Mondial")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Couverture Vaccinale par Région"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)

    chart_data = {
        "categories": ["Afrique", "Asie-Pacifique", "Europe", "Amériques"],
        "series_name": "Couverture (%)",
        "values": [68, 79, 92, 85]
    }

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data_obj = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data_obj.categories = chart_data["categories"]
    chart_data_obj.add_series(chart_data["series_name"], chart_data["values"])

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(7.0), Inches(1.8), Inches(5.2), Inches(3.5),
        chart_data_obj
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ORANGE_ACCENT)

    value_labels = series.data_labels
    value_labels.number_format = "0"
    value_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    value_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)

    chart.has_title = False
    chart.style = 2

    bullet_points = [
        ("Afrique subsaharienne", "68% — Défis logistiques majeurs et infrastructures limitées"),
        ("Asie-Pacifique", "79% — Progrès significatifs mais disparités régionales persistantes"),
        ("Europe", "92% — Couverture élevée grâce aux programmes nationaux robustes"),
        ("Amériques", "85% — Inégalités d'accès entre pays développés et en développement")
    ]

    y_bullet = Inches(1.7)
    for title_text, desc_text in bullet_points:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), y_bullet, Inches(6.0), Inches(0.35),
                     f"● {title_text}", font_size=12, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.4)), y_bullet + Inches(0.3), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.35),
                     desc_text, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GREY)
        y_bullet += Inches(0.75)

    add_footer(slide, "3")


def slide_04_opportunities(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, "Opportunités de Partenariat")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Domaines Clés de Collaboration"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)

    opportunities = [
        ("Chaîne d'Approvisionnement", "Optimisation de la logistique et du transport réfrigéré pour les vaccins sensibles à la température dans les zones reculées."),
        ("Co-développement R&D", "Investissement conjoint dans la recherche sur les vaccins contre le paludisme, la tuberculose et les maladies émergentes."),
        ("Réseaux de Distribution", "Déploiement d'infrastructures de distribution partagées avec les gouvernements partenaires et l'OMS."),
        ("Santé Numérique", "Plateformes de suivi numérique pour la traçabilité des vaccins, la surveillance épidémiologique et l'éducation sanitaire.")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.6)
    card_h = Inches(1.3)
    gap_v = Inches(0.2)
    start_y = Inches(2.4)

    for i, (title_text, desc_text) in enumerate(opportunities):
        y = start_y + i * (card_h + gap_v)
        card = add_card(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), y, card_w, card_h, bg_hex=LIGHT_GREY)

        accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), y, Inches(0.06), card_h)
        accent_bar.fill.solid()
        accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ORANGE_ACCENT)
        accent_bar.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(CARD_PADDING)), y + Inches(CARD_PADDING),
                     card_w - Inches(CARD_PADDING * 2), Inches(0.45),
                     title_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(CARD_PADDING)), y + Inches(0.55),
                     card_w - Inches(CARD_PADDING * 2), Inches(0.7),
                     desc_text, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GREY)

    add_footer(slide, "4")


def slide_05_impact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, "Impact et Mesure")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Mesure de l'Impact du Partenariat"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(28)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)

    pie_data = {
        "categories": ["Vies Sauvées", "Éradication Maladies", "Croissance Économique", "Renforcement Systèmes"],
        "series_name": "Impact Réparti",
        "values": [42, 18, 25, 15]
    }

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    pie_chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    pie_chart_data.categories = pie_data["categories"]
    pie_chart_data.add_series(pie_data["series_name"], pie_data["values"])

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.8), Inches(5.0), Inches(3.2),
        pie_chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    colors = [hex_to_rgb(ORANGE_ACCENT), hex_to_rgb(DEEP_ORANGE), hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY), hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)]
    for idx, color in enumerate(colors):
        point = series.points[idx]
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = color

    value_labels = series.data_labels
    value_labels.number_format = "0%"
    value_labels.font.size = Pt(11)
    value_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)

    kpis = [
        ("2.4M", "Vies sauvées\nen 2024"),
        ("38%", "Réduction mortalité\ninfantile cible"),
        ("$12B", "Retour sur investissement\ndu partenariat"),
        ("156", "Pays partenaires\nactifs")
    ]

    kpi_w = Inches(2.7)
    kpi_h = Inches(1.4)
    gap_kpi = Inches(0.15)
    start_x_kpi = (Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH) - 4 * kpi_w - 3 * gap_kpi) / 2
    y_kpi = Inches(5.4)

    for i, (number_text, desc_text) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = start_x_kpi + i * (kpi_w + gap_kpi)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y_kpi, kpi_w, kpi_h, bg_hex=LIGHT_GREY)

        accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y_kpi, kpi_w, Inches(0.06))
        accent_bar.fill.solid()
        accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ORANGE_ACCENT)
        accent_bar.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(CARD_PADDING), y_kpi + Inches(CARD_PADDING),
                     kpi_w - Inches(CARD_PADDING * 2), Inches(0.6),
                     number_text, font_size=24, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(CARD_PADDING), y_kpi + Inches(0.75),
                     kpi_w - Inches(CARD_PADDING * 2), Inches(0.6),
                     desc_text, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GREY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, "5")


def slide_06_calltoaction(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, "Prochaines Étapes")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Rejoignez le Mouvement"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(36)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.7), Inches(8), Inches(0.6),
                 "Votre engagement peut transformer la santé mondiale pour des millions de personnes.",
                 font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GREY)

    timeline = [
        ("Phase 1 — Q1 2025", "Signature du cadre de partenariat et constitution du comité directeur"),
        ("Phase 2 — Q2-Q3 2025", "Lancement des projets pilotes dans 5 pays prioritaires"),
        ("Phase 3 — Q4 2025", "Évaluation d'impact et expansion à l'échelle régionale")
    ]

    y_tl = Inches(2.6)
    for i, (phase_text, desc_text) in enumerate(timeline):
        dot = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), y_tl + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3))
        dot.fill.solid()
        dot.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ORANGE_ACCENT)
        dot.line.fill.background()

        if i < len(timeline) - 1:
            line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.12)), y_tl + Inches(0.45), Inches(0.06), Inches(1.3))
            line.fill.solid()
            line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY)
            line.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.5)), y_tl, Inches(7), Inches(0.4),
                     phase_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.5)), y_tl + Inches(0.38), Inches(7), Inches(0.4),
                     desc_text, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GREY)
        y_tl += Inches(1.6)

    cta_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(9.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.7))
    cta_box.fill.solid()
    cta_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ORANGE_ACCENT)
    cta_box.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.6), Inches(3.85), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.6),
                 "Contacter l'Équipe", font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    contact_info = [
        ("Email:", "partnerships@globalvaccination.org"),
        ("Site Web:", "www.globalvaccination-partnership.org"),
        ("Téléphone:", "+33 1 42 68 50 00")
    ]

    y_contact = Inches(5.0)
    for label, value in contact_info:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), y_contact, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3),
                     label, font_size=12, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(1.6)), y_contact, Inches(4), Inches(0.3),
                     value, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GREY)
        y_contact += Inches(0.35)

    add_footer(slide, "6")


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_vision(prs)
    slide_03_landscape(prs)
    slide_04_opportunities(prs)
    slide_05_impact(prs)
    slide_06_calltoaction(prs)

    prs.save("Global_Vaccination_Partnership.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
